MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Of Richard Merryman
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
(650-599-9463) Michael Adams for Plaintiff/opposing party Thomas Sinkiewicz .
(415-969-6783) Ujvala Singh and Kevin Holl for Defendant/ Moving Richard Merryman.
(510-418-4942) Harold P. Smith for Defendant / opposing party SKYLINE 83 BATAVIA INVESTORS.
Court Reporter: Nancy Presant. CSR: 9906. Telephone #: (510-7578550). (D501)

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Mr. Adams presented oral arguement in oppostion to the claim that the statute of limitation started running in April 2014, that the statute began in June 2015 and cited Illinois consumer statute. Mr. Holl provided background information and stated that if the tentative ruling is adopted then the amended complaint is moot due to the 1542 waiver. Counsel provided rebuttal argument.

DEFENDANT RICHARD MERRYMAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is taken under submission. Parties to submit a form of order that conforms to the tentative ruling. Mr. Holl to include a summary regarding the leave to amend as to why it should be denied. Mr. Adams to include why the Court should allow an amended complaint be filed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Court Reporter: Nancy Presant. CSR: 9906. Telephone #: (510-7578550). (D501)
